---
title: "Catastrophe ELT Primer Executable Index"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    template: ../doc_template.html
    embed-resources: true
---

## Render Scripts

| Script | Purpose | Inputs | Output |
|---|---|---|---|
| `scripts/render_primer.sh` | Render canonical primer with dev/full simulation control | `render.env`, `MODE` | `outputs/elt_primer.html` |
| `scripts/render_quickstart.sh` | Render quickstart companion | `render.env` | `outputs/primer_quickstart.html` |
| `scripts/render_index.sh` | Render this executable index | `render.env` | `outputs/executable_index.html` |
| `scripts/render_all.sh` | Render full package in one command | `render.env`, `MODE` | All three HTML files |

## Just Targets

| Target | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `just image-build` | Build container image |
| `just render-dev-container` | Render package in dev mode |
| `just render-full-container` | Render package in full mode |
| `just render-primer-container mode=full` | Render only canonical primer |
| `just clean` | Remove outputs |

## Primer Section Map (Where to Look)

| Primer Section | Use When | Typical Output |
|---|---|---|
| What "ELT" Means in Practice | onboarding readers to terminology | shared language and assumptions |
| Generating Synthetic ELTs (Why and How) | testing workflows without production data | controlled synthetic ELT tables |
| OEP and AEP: Choosing the Right Lens | choosing occurrence vs annual risk framing | OEP/AEP points by return period |
| From ELT to Empirical Distributions | converting row-level ELT to decision distributions | empirical event/annual quantiles and EP/RP tables |
| End-to-end mini-case: synthetic ELT to treaty outputs | demonstrating full chain for committees | linked OEP/AEP and treaty response outputs |
| Production Implementation and Governance | release and sign-off readiness | gates, assumptions, checklist, decision template |

## Deterministic Controls

`render.env` controls simulation depth and seeds:

1. `DEV_N_SIMS`
2. `FULL_N_SIMS`
3. `SEED_R`
4. `SEED_PY`
5. `OUTPUT_DIR`

## Expected Render Sequence

1. Build image once: `just image-build`
2. Iterate quickly: `just render-dev-container`
3. Final check: `just render-full-container`
